original_instruction: Conduct a post-v0.3 security audit for PixelForge. Check CSP, CORS, and API rate limiting.

summary: Security audit complete. 3 fixes, all PRs created

original_instruction: Research 5 competitors (Figma, Canva, Adobe Express, Designs.ai, Looka) and create a comparison table.

summary: Competitor analysis complete. 5-company comparison HTML (650 lines), executive summary created

original_instruction: v0.4 release final check. All tests pass, create release tag, send customer notifications.

summary: v0.4 release complete. 142/142 tests passed, tag created, customer notifications sent to 10 companies

original_instruction: Draft v0.5 roadmap. Create a list of major features and schedule proposal by next week.
